caption: A large assembly of people is gathered in a tiered seating area, likely a legislative chamber, with rows of individuals facing forward. The people are dressed in a variety of attire, including formal Western-style suits, traditional Indian clothing like kurtas and sarees, and Nehru jackets in colors such as grey, white, yellow, and black. Most individuals are seated and looking toward the front, though some are engaged in quiet conversation or resting their heads on their hands. The seating consists of long, light-colored benches separated by aisles. Across the sequence of images, there is very little movement; the attendees remain largely stationary in their seats, and the overall composition of the crowd stays the same. The lighting is bright and even across the entire scene, and there are no visible logos, equipment, or on-screen text present.
